children.text: To the extent provided in section 72(t)(9), section 72(t) shall apply to any amount includible in gross income under this subsection.

children.text: The maximum amount of the compensation of any one individual which may be deferred under subsection (a) during any taxable year shall not exceed the amount in effect under subsection (b)(2)(A) (as modified by any adjustment provided under subsection (b)(3)).

children.heading: Minimum distribution requirements
children.label: 2 Minimum distribution requirements
children.text: A plan meets the minimum distribution requirements of this paragraph if such plan meets the requirements of section 401(a)(9).

children.heading: Special rule for government plan
children.label: 3 Special rule for government plan
children.text: An eligible deferred compensation plan of an employer described in subsection (e)(1)(A) shall not be treated as failing to meet the requirements of this subsection solely by reason of making a distribution described in subsection (e)(9)(A).

children.heading: Other definitions and special rules
children.label: e Other definitions and special rules
A
children.text: a State, political subdivision of a State, and any agency or instrumentality of a State or political subdivision of a State, and

children.label: B
children.text: any other organization (other than a governmental unit) exempt from tax under this subtitle.

children.heading: Performance of service
children.label: 2 Performance of service
children.text: The performance of service includes performance of service as an independent contractor and the person (or governmental unit) for whom such services are performed shall be treated as the employer.

children.heading: Participant
children.label: 3 Participant
children.text: The term “participant” means an individual who is eligible to defer compensation under the plan.

children.heading: Beneficiary
children.label: 4 Beneficiary
children.text: The term “beneficiary” means a beneficiary of the participant, his estate, or any other person whose interest in the plan is derived from the participant.

children.heading: Includible compensation
children.label: 5 Includible compensation
children.text: The term “includible compensation” has the meaning given to the term “participant’s compensation” by section 415(c)(3).

children.heading: Compensation taken into account at present value
children.label: 6 Compensation taken into account at present value
children.text: Compensation shall be taken into account at its present value.

children.heading: Community property laws
children.label: 7 Community property laws
children.text: The amount of includible compensation shall be determined without regard to any community property laws.

children.heading: Income attributable
children.label: 8 Income attributable
children.text: Gains from the disposition of property shall be treated as income attributable to such property.

children.heading: Benefits of tax exempt organization plans not treated as made available by reason of certain elections, etc.
children.label: 9 Benefits of tax exempt organization plans not treated as made available by reason of certain elections, etc.

children.heading: Total amount payable is dollar limit or less
children.label: A Total amount payable is dollar limit or less
i
children.text: the portion of such amount which is not attributable to rollover contributions (as defined in section 411(a)(11)(D)) does not exceed the dollar limit under section 411(a)(11)(A), and

children.label: I
children.text: no amount has been deferred under the plan with respect to such participant during the 2-year period ending on the date of the distribution, and

children.label: II
children.text: there has been no prior distribution under the plan to such participant to which this subparagraph applied.

children.heading: Election to defer commencement of distributions
children.label: B Election to defer commencement of distributions
i
children.text: such election is made after amounts may be available under the plan in accordance with subsection (d)(1)(A) and before commencement of such distributions, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the participant may make only 1 such election.

children.heading: Transfers between plans
children.label: 10 Transfers between plans
children.text: A participant shall not be required to include in gross income any portion of the entire amount payable to such participant solely by reason of the transfer of such portion from 1 eligible deferred compensation plan to another eligible deferred compensation plan.

children.label: i
children.text: Any bona fide vacation leave, sick leave, compensatory time, severance pay, disability pay, or death benefit plan.

children.label: ii
children.text: Any plan paying solely length of service awards to bona fide volunteers (or their beneficiaries) on account of qualified services performed by such volunteers.

children.heading: Special rules applicable to length of service award plans
children.label: B Special rules applicable to length of service award plans
I
children.text: reimbursement for (or a reasonable allowance for) reasonable expenses incurred in the performance of such services, or

children.label: II
children.text: reasonable benefits (including length of service awards), and nominal fees for such services, customarily paid by eligible employers in connection with the performance of such services by volunteers.

children.heading: Limitation on accruals
children.label: ii Limitation on accruals
children.text: A plan shall not be treated as described in subparagraph (A)(ii) if the aggregate amount of length of service awards accruing with respect to any year of service for any bona fide volunteer exceeds $6,000.

children.heading: Cost of living adjustment
children.label: iii Cost of living adjustment
children.text: In the case of taxable years beginning after , the Secretary shall adjust the $6,000 amount under clause (ii) at the same time and in the same manner as under section 415(d), except that the base period shall be the calendar quarter beginning , and any increase under this paragraph that is not a multiple of $500 shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $500.December 31, 2017July 1, 2016

children.heading: Special rule for application of limitation on accruals for certain plans
children.label: iv Special rule for application of limitation on accruals for certain plans
children.text: In the case of a plan described in subparagraph (A)(ii) which is a defined benefit plan (as defined in section 414(j)), the limitation under clause (ii) shall apply to the actuarial present value of the aggregate amount of length of service awards accruing with respect to any year of service. Such actuarial present value with respect to any year shall be calculated using reasonable actuarial assumptions and methods, assuming payment will be made under the most valuable form of payment under the plan with payment commencing at the later of the earliest age at which unreduced benefits are payable under the plan or the participant’s age at the time of the calculation.

children.heading: Qualified services
children.label: C Qualified services
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “qualified services” means fire fighting and prevention services, emergency medical services, and ambulance services.

children.label: D Certain voluntary early retirement incentive plans
I
children.text: makes payments or supplements as an early retirement benefit, a retirement-type subsidy, or a benefit described in the last sentence of section 411(a)(9), and

children.label: II
children.text: such payments or supplements are made in coordination with a defined benefit plan which is described in section 401(a) and includes a trust exempt from tax under section 501(a) and which is maintained by an eligible employer described in paragraph (1)(A) or by an education association described in clause (ii)(II),

children.label: ii Applicable voluntary early retirement incentive plan
I
children.text: a local educational agency (as defined in section 8101 of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965), or

children.label: II
children.text: an education association which principally represents employees of 1 or more agencies described in subclause (I) and which is described in section 501(c)(5) or (6) and exempt from tax under section 501(a).

children.heading: Exception for nonelective deferred compensation of nonemployees
children.label: 12 Exception for nonelective deferred compensation of nonemployees

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: This section shall not apply to nonelective deferred compensation attributable to services not performed as an employee.

children.heading: Nonelective deferred compensation
children.label: B Nonelective deferred compensation
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), deferred compensation shall be treated as nonelective only if all individuals (other than those who have not satisfied any applicable initial service requirement) with the same relationship to the payor are covered under the same plan with no individual variations or options under the plan.

children.heading: Special rule for churches
children.label: 13 Special rule for churches
children.text: The term “eligible employer” shall not include a church (as defined in section 3121(w)(3)(A)) or qualified church-controlled organization (as defined in section 3121(w)(3)(B)).

children.heading: Treatment of qualified governmental excess benefit arrangements
children.label: 14 Treatment of qualified governmental excess benefit arrangements
children.text: Subsections (b)(2) and (c)(1) shall not apply to any qualified governmental excess benefit arrangement (as defined in section 415(m)(3)), and benefits provided under such an arrangement shall not be taken into account in determining whether any other plan is an eligible deferred compensation plan.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The applicable dollar amount is $15,000.

children.heading: Cost-of-living adjustments
children.label: B Cost-of-living adjustments
children.text: In the case of taxable years beginning after , the Secretary shall adjust the $15,000 amount under subparagraph (A) at the same time and in the same manner as under section 415(d), except that the base period shall be the calendar quarter beginning , and any increase under this paragraph which is not a multiple of $500 shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $500.December 31, 2006July 1, 2005

children.label: iii

children.heading: Certain rules made applicable
children.label: B Certain rules made applicable
children.text: The rules of paragraphs (2) through (7), (9), and (11) of section 402(c) and section 402(f) shall apply for purposes of subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Reporting
children.label: C Reporting
children.text: Rollovers under this paragraph shall be reported to the Secretary in the same manner as rollovers from qualified retirement plans (as defined in section 4974(c)).

children.heading: Plan includes arrangements, etc.
children.label: A Plan includes arrangements, etc.
children.text: The term “plan” includes any agreement or arrangement.

children.heading: Substantial risk of forfeiture
children.label: B Substantial risk of forfeiture
children.text: The rights of a person to compensation are subject to a substantial risk of forfeiture if such person’s rights to such compensation are conditioned upon the future performance of substantial services by any individual.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The portion of an applicable employment retention plan described in this paragraph with respect to any participant is that portion of the plan which provides benefits payable to the participant not in excess of twice the applicable dollar limit determined under subsection (e)(15).

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: i Limitation
children.text: Paragraph (2)(F) shall only apply to the portion of the plan described in subparagraph (A) for years preceding the year in which such portion is paid or otherwise made available to the participant.

children.heading: Treatment
children.label: ii Treatment
children.text: A plan shall not be treated for purposes of this title as providing for the deferral of compensation for any year with respect to the portion of the plan described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Governmental plans must maintain set-asides for exclusive benefit of participants
children.label: g Governmental plans must maintain set-asides for exclusive benefit of participants

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A plan maintained by an eligible employer described in subsection (e)(1)(A) shall not be treated as an eligible deferred compensation plan unless all assets and income of the plan described in subsection (b)(6) are held in trust for the exclusive benefit of participants and their beneficiaries.

children.label: A
children.text: a trust described in paragraph (1) shall be treated as an organization exempt from taxation under section 501(a), and

children.label: B
children.text: notwithstanding any other provision of this title, amounts in the trust shall be includible in the gross income of participants and beneficiaries only to the extent, and at the time, provided in this section.

children.heading: Custodial accounts and contracts
children.label: 3 Custodial accounts and contracts
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, custodial accounts and contracts described in section 401(f) shall be treated as trusts under rules similar to the rules under section 401(f).

children.heading: Death benefits under USERRA-qualified active military service
children.label: 4 Death benefits under USERRA-qualified active military service
children.text: A plan described in paragraph (1) shall not be treated as an eligible deferred compensation plan unless such plan meets the requirements of section 401(a)(37).
